positive: A highly detailed, abstract representation of stylized mountain peaks and celestial nebula merged into a single silhouette. The design must be symmetrical and geometrically clean, forming a seamless, continuous visual structure perfect for apparel prints. The aesthetic should be a mix of minimalist vector art and ethereal illustration. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, violet, accented with luminous cyan and shimmering gold detailing. The composition must be central and balanced, emphasizing sharp edges and clean outlines against a presumed dark background. Focus on bold silhouettes and geometric patterns, suitable for screen printing.
